column3: Future Facts with Will (使用 Will 表達未來的客觀事實)
column4: Use will to talk about future facts. Remember, a fact is something that is true. 7
column5: 我們使用 will (將會) 來談論「未來一定會發生的客觀事實」（不是個人計畫或猜測，而是大自然規律或不可改變的狀態） 7。
column6: ["In two hours, it will be noon where you live. (兩個小時後，你住的地方將會是正午。)","On the other side of the world, it won't be noon. (在世界的另一端，將不會是正午。)","It will be 12:00 at night! (將會是半夜 12 點！)","You will be 8 years old tomorrow. (你明天就會滿 8 歲了。)","The sun will rise tomorrow at 5:00 a.m. (明天早上 5 點太陽將會升起。)"]

column3: Definite Article "The" with Countries (特定國家名稱前面加上定冠詞 The)
column4: We use the before a country name when the country name is plural (like the United States), or when it has the word Kingdom or Republic. 8
column5: 通常國家名字前面不加 the。但是，如果國家名字是「複數形態」（例如 United States），或是名稱中包含 Kingdom (王國)、Republic (共和國)，前面就必須加上定冠詞 the 8。
column6: ["He lives in the United States. (他住在美國。)","She lives in France. (她住在法國。法國為一般名詞，不加 the)","We live in the United Kingdom. (我們住在英國。)","We traveled to the Republic of Ireland. (我們去愛爾蘭共和國旅行。)","Our class is studying about the United Arab Emirates. (我們班正在學習關於阿拉伯聯合大公國的知識。)"]
